emails.subject: OE Term Sheet
emails.body: OE Term Sheet Audrey, Attached is a term sheet that Barbara Gray prepared some time back for the OE agreement. Please review. How does tomorrow afternoon look for you. About 2:00 pm.

emails.subject: Re: OE Term Sheet
emails.body: Re: OE Term Sheet Gerald- I have the Lost Creek Members Meeting tomorrow. What's your schedule later in the week? Are we busy people, or what? Take Care, Audrey

emails.subject: Re: OE Term Sheet

emails.subject: Re: OE Term Sheet
emails.body: Wednesday works for me. Morning would be a good time for me. Audrey O'Neil 10/23/2000 01:58 PM
